user.title: Add shopping list
user.description: Name of the new shopping list (e.g. "Edeka").

scan_barcode.name: Scan barcode
scan_barcode.description: Looks up a scanned barcode and adds the matching product to the appropriate shopping list.

set_day_meal.name: Set meal plan day
set_day_meal.description: Sets or clears the dish/free text for one weekday in the meal plan.

dish_id.name: Dish
dish_id.description: ID of a dish/restaurant. Leave empty for free text or to clear the day.

free_text.name: Free text
free_text.description: Free-form text, used when no dish is selected.
